catalog: null

package.json.content:
{
  "devDependencies": {
    "@biomejs/biome": "catalog:",
    "@changesets/cli": "catalog:",
    "@commitlint/cli": "catalog:",
    "@commitlint/config-conventional": "catalog:",
    "@evilmartians/lefthook": "catalog:",
    "@faker-js/faker": "catalog:",
    "@snapback/tsconfig": "workspace:*",
    "@testing-library/react": "catalog:",
    "@testing-library/user-event": "catalog:",
    "@types/glob": "catalog:",
    "@types/node": "catalog:",
    "@types/pg": "catalog:",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "catalog:",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "catalog:",
    "@vitest/ui": "catalog:",
    "diff": "catalog:",
    "dotenv-cli": "catalog:",
    "happy-dom": "catalog:",
    "jsdom": "catalog:",
    "lefthook": "catalog:",
    "lint-staged": "catalog:",
    "minimatch": "catalog:",
    "syncpack": "catalog:",
    "tsup": "catalog:",
    "tsx": "catalog:",
    "turbo": "catalog:",
    "typescript": "catalog:",
    "vitest": "catalog:"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=18.17.0"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.14.0",
  "pnpm": {
    "overrides": {
      "@types/react": "19.1.13",
      "@types/react-dom": "19.1.9",
      "require-in-the-middle": "^8.0.0",
      "@node-rs/argon2": "2.0.0",
      "@types/glob": "7.1.1",
      "@types/mdx": "2.0.13",
      "@types/minimatch": "5.1.2",
      "better-auth": "^1.3.26",
      "hono": "^4.10.3",
      "playwright": "^1.55.1",
      "esbuild": "^0.25.0",
      "dompurify": "^3.2.4"
    }
  },
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "build": "turbo build",
    "build:mcp": "pnpm -w --filter @snapback/mcp-server run build",
    "build:mcp:deps": "pnpm -w --filter @snapback/contracts --filter @snapback/events --filter @snapback/core --filter @snapback/sdk run build",
    "changeset": "changeset",
    "clean": "turbo clean",
    "dev": "turbo dev",
    "format": "biome format --write .",
    "lint": "turbo lint",
    "lint:fix": "biome check --apply .",
    "release": "turbo build --filter=!./apps/* && changeset publish",
    "start:mcp": "pnpm -w --filter @snapback/mcp-server start",
    "start:mcp:dev": "pnpm -w --filter @snapback/mcp-server start:dev",
    "syncpack-fix": "syncpack format && syncpack fix-mismatches",
    "syncpack-lint": "syncpack list-mismatches",
    "test": "turbo test",
    "type-check": "turbo type-check",
    "type-check:tsc": "tsc --build --force",
    "validate": "tsx scripts/validate-project.ts"
  }
}

vitest.workspace.ts.content:
import { defineWorkspace } from 'vitest/config';
export default defineWorkspace([{ test: { include: ['{apps,packages}/**/*.{test,spec}.ts?(x)'] } }]);
